title: neolitsea kotoensis
intro: Neolitsea kotoensis, also known as Kotoensis Laurel, is a plant species belonging to the family Lauraceae, native to Taiwan. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The health benefits of Neolitsea kotoensis include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Traditional herbal preparations of Neolitsea kotoensis include tea infusions and extracts, which are used in folk medicine to treat various ailments, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
